productDisplayName: Guess Women G Hype Silver Watch
description: guess watches are creative masterpieces with absolute durability. They have proven themselves in the art of creating high quality timepieces, by combining the epitome of style with impeccable technology. The new range of watches are a fresh take on perfection and are great for urban wear. Case diameter: 38 mm Case thickness: 8 mm Dial shape: Round Warranty: 2 years Stainless steel case with a fixed bezel, crystal embellishments and a steel strap guess logo at the 12 hour mark Three chronograph time, date and day displays for easy reading Butterfly clasp with a white dial and metallic numbers with metallic hands Polished hands to mark sub dials Screw to reset time, alarm and set the timer Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 50 meters, allowing you to use it even when showering
